analysis.name: Deel
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one platform to hire, pay, and manage employees and contractors in 150+ countries while handling compliance automatically.
analysis.ideal_customer: HR and finance teams at growth-stage or enterprise companies hiring internationally across multiple countries

features.name: employer of record (eor)
features.description: Hire full-time employees in countries where company has no legal entity, with Deel as the legal employer
features.evidence_quote: Hire employees in 150+ countries without setting up a local entity

features.name: contractor management
features.description: Onboard, manage, and pay international independent contractors with compliant contracts
features.evidence_quote: Compliantly hire and pay contractors in 150+ countries

features.name: global payroll
features.description: Run multi-country payroll for employees in local currencies with automated tax calculations
features.evidence_quote: Run payroll in 100+ countries with local compliance built in

features.name: hris
features.description: Core HR information system with employee directory, org chart, and people data management
features.evidence_quote: Deel HR — free forever HRIS for any team size

features.evidence_quote: Run US payroll with full-service tax filings included

features.evidence_quote: Immigration by Deel — relocate talent with end-to-end visa support

features.evidence_quote: Run background checks for any hire, anywhere

features.evidence_quote: Offer locally compliant benefits to your global workforce

features.name: instant payments

features.evidence_quote: Store, manage, and access all employee documents in one place

features.evidence_quote: Run performance reviews and track goals with Deel Engage

differentiators: Coverage in 150+ countries for both EOR and contractor management
All-in-one platform combining HRIS, payroll, EOR, and compliance in a single product
Free HRIS tier with no seat limits
Deel Card giving contractors instant access to earnings via Visa prepaid card
Built-in local compliance — contracts, taxes, and labor law handled automatically per country
120+ currencies and 10+ withdrawal methods including cryptocurrency
Immigration services integrated alongside employment products

recent_ships.what: Deel Engage launched — performance management, engagement surveys, and LMS in one module
Deel AI HR assistant introduced for policy Q&A and workflow automation
US Payroll product expanded with full-service tax filing support
Immigration by Deel launched as integrated visa and work permit service
Deel HR (free HRIS) launched with unlimited seats at no cost

praised: Extremely fast contractor onboarding — contracts signed and paid in under 24 hours
Compliance confidence — users praise not having to worry about local labor law
Contractor experience rated highly — easy to submit invoices and withdraw funds
Deel Card is a standout perk contractors appreciate for instant access to earnings
Wide country coverage — praised for supporting obscure markets other platforms miss
complaints: EOR pricing seen as expensive ($599/month/employee) for smaller companies or lower-salary markets
Customer support can be slow to respond, especially for complex payroll issues
Platform complexity — many features make it hard to navigate for first-time admins
Occasional payment delays reported despite same-day promises
HRIS features feel less mature compared to dedicated HRIS platforms like BambooHR
Pricing transparency criticized — final costs unclear until deep in sales process

free_tier.limits: Unlimited seats; core HRIS only (no payroll, no EOR, no contractor payments)

tiers.name: Deel HR
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free HRIS: directory, org chart, PTO, docs, onboarding — unlimited employees

tiers.name: Contractors
tiers.headline_inclusions: Hire and pay international contractors with compliant contracts and multi-currency payments

tiers.name: Employer of Record
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full EOR: hire full-time employees in 150+ countries, benefits, compliance included

tiers.name: Global Payroll
tiers.headline_inclusions: Run payroll for employees in your own entities across 100+ countries

tiers.name: US Payroll
tiers.headline_inclusions: Domestic US payroll with full-service tax filing and direct deposit

pricing.notes: Pricing is per-worker per-month and billed based on active headcount. EOR pricing may vary by country. Volume discounts available for large teams. Immigration services and background checks are add-ons priced separately. All pricing approximate from training data — source pages returned only cookie consent content.
